name: awesome-claude-code-plugins
description: A curated awesome-list of Claude Code plugins organized by category: workflow orchestration, DevOps automation, code quality, data analytics, design/UX, git workflow, security/compliance, and more. Includes a set of official Claude Code plugins (agent-sdk-dev, pr-review-toolkit, commit-commands, feature-dev, security-guidance) with working implementations.

findings_summary.notes: High-quality curated list with bundled plugin implementations. The included security-guidance plugin (security_reminder_hook.py) is a PreToolUse hook that intercepts Write/Edit/MultiEdit tool calls and warns about known dangerous patterns (eval, innerHTML, pickle, os.system, GitHub Actions injection, dangerouslySetInnerHTML, etc.) — a genuinely useful security tool. The hook uses exit code 2 to block tool use when a pattern is detected, which is correct hook behavior. Hooks are scoped to Edit/Write/MultiEdit only. The agent-sdk-dev plugin is attributed to an Anthropic employee (ashwin@anthropic.com). Chinese README available (README-zh.md). Apache-2.0 licensed. Curated list quality is high with categories and official plugin examples. The bundled security hook is the most substantive implemented component — reviewed and found safe.
